resources.string:
This app performs active security testing: network scanning, credential brute-forcing, and SQL injection probing.

 Only point these tools at systems you own outright, or systems for which you hold explicit, documented, written authorization to test.

 Running these tools against networks, servers, accounts, or applications you do not own or are not authorized to test is illegal in most jurisdictions (e.g. the U.S. Computer Fraud and Abuse Act and equivalent laws elsewhere) and can carry criminal penalties.

 By continuing, you confirm that every target you scan with this app is one you own or are explicitly authorized in writing to test, and that you take full responsibility for how you use it.
I confirm I will only target systems I own or am explicitly authorized to test
I own this target or hold written authorization to test it
Text present ONLY on failed login (e.g. "Invalid password")
Target URL with query string (e.g. https://your-app.example/item?id=1)
